description: Italian SDVECU installation with partial-only interior + perimeter (via alarmPartitions, NOT via JWT)
scenario_notes: Partial-only: ARMNIGHT in caps, ARMDAY absent. The single 'partial' UI button maps to ARMNIGHT1.
Has perimeter, but JWT does NOT advertise PERI capability — peri must be detected via alarmPartitions[id='02'] with non-empty enterStates.
This is the case that forces _detect_peri to remain in the codebase: JWT-only peri detection would yield a false negative here.
